steps.title: Your first expedition
steps.body: Sort four matching layers into one flask. A completed potion activates immediately.

steps.title: Defeat the guardian
steps.body: Reduce Enemy Vitality to zero. Armor absorbs direct damage, but poison bypasses it.

steps.title: Read the next move
steps.body: This card reveals what the enemy will do, its damage, and how many pours remain.

steps.title: Pick up a flask
steps.body: Tap the glowing flask. You always pour the connected color from the top.

steps.title: Pour onto a match
steps.body: Tap the second glowing flask. Colors must match, or the destination must be empty.

steps.title: Mistakes are reversible
steps.body: Undo restores the previous pour and also restores the enemy countdown.

steps.title: Complete a potion
steps.body: Build four layers of one color. Red damages, green heals, blue shields, and purple poisons.

steps.title: Brewing creates mana
steps.body: Each completed potion fills this meter. Mana powers your brewer's active skill.

steps.title: Reaction: Fire Burst
steps.body: Complete a second Fire Potion. The order of completed colors creates an Alchemy Reaction; Red then Red amplifies fire damage.

steps.title: Cast your active skill
steps.body: Use the lit skill button. Your starting kit changes this ability and its play style.

steps.title: Choose your route
steps.body: Glowing nodes are reachable. Compare battles, events, shops, and safe campfires before choosing.
